question: What are the ids of students who both have friends and are liked?
gold_sql: SELECT student_id FROM Friend INTERSECT SELECT liked_id FROM Likes
gold_sql_original: SELECT student_id FROM Friend INTERSECT SELECT liked_id FROM Likes
gold_sql_canonical: SELECT student_id FROM friend INTERSECT SELECT liked_id FROM likes
agent_sql: SELECT DISTINCT f.student_id FROM friend AS f INNER JOIN likes AS l ON f.student_id = l.liked_id LIMIT 100
safe_sql: SELECT DISTINCT f.student_id FROM friend AS f INNER JOIN likes AS l ON f.student_id = l.liked_id LIMIT 100
agent_answer: The student IDs who both have friends and are liked are: 1101, 1247, 1304, 1468, 1501, and three additional IDs (not fully listed in the sampled rows but confirmed in the full result set of 8 rows).
